navigation_architecture.details: Bottom Tabs for main sections: 'Alarms', 'Stats'. Stack navigator for 'Set Alarm' modal, 'Alarm Ringing' full screen interrupt, 'Proof Mission' screen, and 'Check-in' alert.

hierarchy.h1: font-family: Barlow Condensed, font-size: 48px, font-weight: 900, text-transform: uppercase, letter-spacing: -1px
hierarchy.h2: font-family: Barlow Condensed, font-size: 32px, font-weight: 800, text-transform: uppercase
hierarchy.h3: font-family: Barlow Condensed, font-size: 24px, font-weight: 700, text-transform: uppercase
hierarchy.alarmTime: font-family: Barlow Condensed, font-size: 80px, font-weight: 900, letter-spacing: -2px, line-height: 80px
hierarchy.label: font-family: Manrope, font-size: 12px, font-weight: 800, text-transform: uppercase, letter-spacing: 2px, color: #888888

spacing_and_layout.grid: Grid Borders and Flat Tactical Surfaces. Avoid soft shadows. Use 1px solid borders.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align forms and dense content. Center-align extreme actions like 'Wake Up' and Mission constraints.

buttons.primary: Background #00E5FF, Text #0A0A0A (Black), Font Weight 900 Uppercase, Border Radius 6px, Padding 16px. No shadow.
buttons.urgent: Background #FF3B30, Text #FFFFFF, Font Weight 900 Uppercase, Border Radius 6px, Padding 16px.
buttons.ghost: Background transparent, Border 1px solid #262626, Text #FFFFFF, Font Weight 700.

cards.default: Background #141414, Border 1px solid #262626, Border Radius 8px, Padding 20px.
cards.active: Background #1E1E1E, Border 1px solid #00E5FF, Border Radius 8px, Padding 20px.

inputs.text: Background #0A0A0A, Border 2px solid #262626, Text #FFFFFF, Padding 16px, Border Radius 6px. Focus state: Border #00E5FF.

micro_interactions: Haptics: Provide heavy haptic feedback on toggle press, mission start, typing keys in mission, and successful check-in.
Alarm Pulse: The background on the ringing screen should scale and pulse in opacity to simulate extreme urgency.
Shake animation: If user fails typing/math, shake the input container horizontally.

home_alarm_list.layout: Header with 'STAYWAKE' in H2. Scrollable list of alarm cards. Floating Action Button (FAB) or large bottom button to 'ADD ALARM'.
home_alarm_list.visuals: Alarm cards show Time (massive), AM/PM, Mission type icon, and a large toggle. Use 'empty_state_sleep' image centered if list is empty.

set_alarm.layout: Modal (bottom sheet style). Large vertical time picker wheel. Bento grid for 'Mission Type' (Math, Type, Shake) and 'Check-in Frequency' (e.g., 5 min, 10 min).
set_alarm.visuals: Tactical selection: Unselected grid items have #262626 borders. Selected items have #00E5FF borders and #1E1E1E backgrounds.

alarm_ringing.visuals: Background image 'alarm_ringing_bg' with a black/red overlay (opacity 0.6). Giant '07:30' text. Massive 'STOP ALARM' urgent button. It should feel aggressive and impossible to ignore.

proof_mission.layout: Top: Instructions ('Type this phrase exactly' or 'Solve Math'). Middle: The challenge text and input field. Bottom: Native Keyboard or Custom Numpad.
proof_mission.visuals: Strict, terminal-like UI. Use JetBrains Mono for the challenge. Error state turns input border #FF3B30.

stay_awake_checkin.layout: Interrupt modal. Giant countdown circle or bar (e.g., 60 seconds to respond).
stay_awake_checkin.visuals: Uses 'success_bg' very subtly. Prominent 'I AM AWAKE' button which triggers a mini mission.

success_stats.layout: Dashboard bento layout. Top section shows current streak (massive number). Middle sections show win/loss ratio.
success_stats.visuals: Dark UI with #00E5FF accents for wins, #FF3B30 for missed days. Tactical high-contrast metrics.

alarm_ringing_bg.description: Abstract dark background with intense glowing red/orange kinetic lines. Use as absolute background for the 'Alarm Ringing' screen to maximize urgency.

success_bg.description: Abstract dark background with glowing electric blue and white geometric shapes. Use subtly for 'Check-in' active states or 'Morning Success' header.

empty_state_sleep.description: Minimalist dark 3D illustration of a closed eye/moon with neon blue rim light. Use for empty alarm list state on Home screen.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a React Native Expo app. Translate all design variables into React Native StyleSheet objects or NativeWind classes. Flexbox is standard.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Barlow Condensed' for an athletic, heavy-weight feel. Use 'JetBrains Mono' for math/typing proofs.
Implement the UI with a strict tactical look. No soft, feathery shadows. Use solid 1px borders (#262626) and high contrast. Dark Mode is mandatory.
The App must feel like a 'wake-up completion system', not a normal alarm. The Ringing screen must be visually aggressive and stressful.
Apply data-testid to every button, switch, input, and major view for end-to-end testing.
Use the provided image URLs via React Native <Image> or <ImageBackground> components with appropriate styling (e.g., overlay opacities).
